title: epipactis helleborine
intro: Epipactis helleborine, also known as the helleborine orchid or fairy fox, is a perennial plant species belonging to the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the roots of Epipactis helleborine are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
